transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.
Hello, I need to resc
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Part
of pretty good AI.
Am I speaking with Jordan?

Hi, I’m not Jordan. I’m actually a patient calling in. Let me start again from the top. 

Hello, I need to reschedule my appointment that I have for this week.
No problem.
Thanks.
Can I get your first name to help pull up your record?
Oh sure, my first name is Alex.
May I have your first name, last name, and date of birth?
Of course. My full name is Alex Morgan, and my date of birth is July 12, 1985.
I heard your birthday is July 12, 1985.
Is that correct?
Yes, that’s correct. July 12, 1985.
Can you please spell your first and last name for me?
Sure. My first name: A-L-E-X, and my last name: M-O-R-G-A-N.
What other phone number do we have on file for you?
I'm not sure what number you have on file, but I'm calling you now from my main number. If you need me to confirm or update it, just let me know.
Please provide your phone number.
Sure, my phone number is 555-238-7942.
I'm not able to find your record in the system right now.
I'll connect you to our patient support team so they can help reschedule your appointment.
Please stay on the line.
Alright, I’ll hold. Thank you.
Actually...
This is a dental clinic, so live transfer isn't available right now.
If you like.
I can document your request and have our clinic support team follow up with you as soon as possible.
Would you like me to do that?
Yes, that would be great. If you could document that I need to reschedule my appointment for this week and have them follow up with me, I’d appreciate it.
It looks like I'm unable to document your request right now since live support is open.
Normally I'd transfer you to a human, but that's not available in this demo.
Please call back during regular hours and our team will help you reschedule.
Sorry for the trouble.
I understand. Thanks for letting me know. I'll call back during regular hours to get this sorted out. Appreciate your help.
You're welcome.
If you have any other questions about Pivot Point Orthopedics, just let me know.
Otherwise, have a great day.
Thanks, I think that covers it for now. You have a great day too.
